payload.message: Run the OpenClaw workspace sync to the grimoire repo. Execute: cd /Users/sawyer/github/grimoire && bun run scry:sync:openclaw -- --commit. Report the result briefly.

Run a daily encrypted backup freshness check.

Execute exactly:
cd /Users/sawyer/github/grimoire
META="/Users/sawyer/github/grimoire/vault/config/critical-configs.meta.json"
if [ ! -f "$META" ]; then
  openclaw system event --text "Reminder: daily backup freshness check failed — critical-configs.meta.json is missing in grimoire/vault/config. Investigate backup automation." --mode now
  exit 1
fi
python3 - "$META" <<'PY'
import json, sys, datetime
from datetime import timezone
p=sys.argv[1]
with open(p,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    m=json.load(f)
created=m.get('createdAt')
if not created:
    print('MISSING_CREATED_AT')
    sys.exit(2)
created_dt=datetime.datetime.fromisoformat(created.replace('Z','+00:00'))
age=(datetime.datetime.now(timezone.utc)-created_dt).total_seconds()/3600
print(f'AGE_HOURS={age:.2f}')
if age>26:
    sys.exit(3)
PY
RC=$?
if [ "$RC" -eq 0 ]; then
  exit 0
elif [ "$RC" -eq 2 ]; then
  openclaw system event --text "Reminder: backup freshness check found invalid metadata (missing createdAt). Please inspect critical-configs.meta.json." --mode now
  exit 1
else
  openclaw system event --text "Reminder: encrypted config backup is stale (>26h old). Run backup and investigate scheduler/logs." --mode now
  exit 1
fi

payload.text: Reminder: monthly restore drill is due. Run the OpenClaw backup restore drill checklist in ~/github/grimoire/openclaw/BACKUPS.md and log pass/fail + follow-ups.
